text: Our entire team can't log in this morning — the dashboard just spins and then shows a 500. We have a board demo in two hours. Please help!!!
Hey, small thing: the export-to-CSV button on the Reports page downloads a file with the columns in a weird order. Not urgent, just a bit annoying.
I was charged twice for my October subscription. Card ending 4242. Can you refund the duplicate? Invoice numbers are INV-90122 and INV-90123.
